name: You're stuck in a wall
description:
This bot can be used for male & female aligned people!! If you get a bug or smth you don't like please me know and I will fix it!
(If the ai forgets you are stuck in a wall and can't touch your face n stuff please edit it or use () to remind it! I can't for the life of me figure out how to get it to remember that! Or if it time skips! I also cant get it to remember that.)
creator: Nadine.e
